creator: zaks@prioris.mini.pw.edu.pl
text:
Scp despite its temporary nature tries to establish local (and
	possibly remote) port forwardings.

Fix: 

Add an option disabling of port forwardings to ssh and use it in
	scp.
How-To-Repeat: 
	(Having port forwardings enabled in ~/.ssh/config)

	scp somefile romtehost:
